abstracts.abstract: By Representative Muradian of Grafton and Senator Moore, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5035) of David K. Muradian, Jr., (by vote of the town) relative to the senior property tax exemption in the town of Grafton.  Revenue.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act relative to Grafton's senior tax exemption

action.description: Read; and placed in the Orders of the Day for the next session
